abilities.name: Salvage Right
abilities.text: When a yard, cache, or broken lane pays out gear, you know how to make the haul count.

abilities.name: Scrap Bastion
abilities.text: Forge-heavy route checks through damaged ground count as practical work instead of desperate improvisation.

abilities.name: Yard Warden
abilities.text: A cleared salvage site stays useful longer when you are the one who locked it down.

abilities.name: Last Haul
abilities.text: When the run is nearly breaking, you can still turn one more ruined sector into something worth carrying out.
